title: Neco-hud
description:
This resource pack replaces part of the hud on Neсo-Arс making it more fun.
It has a simple style and variability
body:
# Neco-hud😺

This resource pack replaces part of the hud on Neсo-Arс More specifically:

- Replaces all hearts on Neсo-Arс

- Replaces the hunger bar

- Replaces the experience bar


**View**
## ![What does it look like:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b329ab04dff20063ccdc7051e1ad2944237f28a.png)
**This texture pack is aimed at Neco-Arc fans and those who just want to add some fun to their hud.**
The texture pack doesn't require additional mods or installers, just drag it into the resource packs folder
